## Purpose

Writes signal artifacts with standard frontmatter (skill, topic, item, date, skill_version, input). Enforces topic-item-date naming convention. Supports --json sidecar flag.


## Commands

- scout
- draft
- review
- flow
- trace
- prove
- listen
- topic
